---
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    slide-number: true
    title-slide: false
    theme: simple
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    transition: fade
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .reveal {
          font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
          color: #122033;
        }

        .reveal section.clean > h2 {
          display: none;
        }

        .reveal .slide-background {
          background: #ffffff;
        }

        .deck-box {
          width: 1120px;
          height: 600px;
          margin: 10px auto;
          padding: 42px 50px;
          box-sizing: border-box;
          background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f7fbff 0%, #ffffff 100%);
          border: 2px solid #dceaf8;
          border-radius: 24px;
        }

        .ab-row {
          display: flex;
          gap: 18px;
          margin-bottom: 60px;
        }

        .ab-square {
          width: 86px;
          height: 86px;
          border-radius: 20px;
          color: white;
          font-size: 44px;
          font-weight: 800;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
        }

        .blue {
          background: #1f77b4;
        }

        .orange {
          background: #ff8c42;
        }

        .big-title {
          font-size: 78px;
          font-weight: 800;
          color: #122033;
          margin-top: 25px;
          margin-bottom: 22px;
        }

        .big-subtitle {
          font-size: 34px;
          color: #4f657a;
          margin-bottom: 82px;
        }

        .footer-text {
          font-size: 22px;
          color: #6a7b8c;
        }

        .slide-title {
          font-size: 44px;
          font-weight: 800;
          color: #122033;
          margin-bottom: 16px;
        }

        .slide-subtitle {
          font-size: 25px;
          color: #4e6278;
          margin-bottom: 32px;
          line-height: 1.25;
        }

        .flow-grid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 1.1fr 0.35fr 1.1fr 1.1fr;
          gap: 16px;
          align-items: center;
          margin-top: 22px;
          margin-bottom: 32px;
        }

        .flow-card {
          background: #ffffff;
          border: 2px solid #d6e6f5;
          border-radius: 18px;
          padding: 18px 14px;
          text-align: center;
          box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(20, 60, 100, 0.08);
          min-height: 110px;
        }

        .flow-card p {
          margin: 4px 0;
          font-size: 20px;
          color: #53677a;
        }

        .flow-card strong {
          display: block;
          font-size: 29px;
          color: #122033;
          margin-top: 6px;
        }

        .vs {
          color: #ff8c42;
          font-size: 31px;
          font-weight: 800;
          text-align: center;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
        }

        .rules-grid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
          gap: 18px;
        }

        .rule-card {
          background: #ffffff;
          border-radius: 18px;
          border-top: 8px solid #1f77b4;
          padding: 20px 22px;
          box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(20, 60, 100, 0.08);
          min-height: 135px;
        }

        .rule-card p {
          margin: 0;
          font-size: 18px;
          color: #405568;
          line-height: 1.35;
        }

        .rule-card strong {
          display: block;
          font-size: 23px;
          color: #122033;
          margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        .example-grid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: 1fr 0.22fr 1fr;
          gap: 20px;
          align-items: stretch;
          margin-top: 24px;
        }

        .version-card {
          background: #ffffff;
          border: 2px solid #d6e6f5;
          border-radius: 20px;
          padding: 26px;
          box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(20, 60, 100, 0.08);
        }

        .version-b {
          border: 3px solid #2e8b57;
        }

        .version-card p {
          font-size: 23px;
          margin: 13px 0;
          color: #223344;
        }

        .version-card strong {
          color: #122033;
        }

        .version-heading {
          font-size: 27px;
          font-weight: 800;
          margin-bottom: 18px;
        }

        .subject-line {
          background: #eef6ff;
          border-radius: 14px;
          padding: 18px;
          font-size: 25px;
          font-weight: 700;
          margin-bottom: 22px;
        }

        .winner {
          color: #2e8b57;
          font-weight: 800;
        }

        .why-box {
          background: #fff4e8;
          border-radius: 18px;
          padding: 19px 24px;
          margin-top: 25px;
          font-size: 20px;
          line-height: 1.35;
        }

        .final-grid {
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: 0.95fr 1.2fr;
          gap: 36px;
          margin-top: 22px;
        }

        .use-box {
          background: #ffffff;
          border-radius: 20px;
          padding: 28px 34px;
          box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(20, 60, 100, 0.08);
          font-size: 24px;
          line-height: 1.65;
        }

        .remember-card {
          background: #ffffff;
          border-radius: 18px;
          padding: 17px 22px;
          margin-bottom: 16px;
          display: grid;
          grid-template-columns: 70px 1fr;
          gap: 16px;
          align-items: center;
          box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(20, 60, 100, 0.08);
        }

        .num {
          width: 58px;
          height: 58px;
          background: #1f77b4;
          color: #ffffff;
          border-radius: 50%;
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: center;
          font-size: 26px;
          font-weight: 800;
        }

        .remember-card p {
          margin: 0;
          font-size: 18px;
          color: #405568;
          line-height: 1.3;
        }

        .remember-card strong {
          display: block;
          font-size: 23px;
          color: #122033;
          margin-bottom: 5px;
        }

        .bottom-line {
          margin-top: 24px;
          text-align: center;
          font-size: 34px;
          font-weight: 800;
          color: #ff8c42;
        }
        </style>
---

## Slide 1 {.clean}

::: {.deck-box}

::: {.ab-row}

::: {.ab-square .blue}
A
:::

::: {.ab-square .orange}
B
:::

:::

::: {.big-title}
A/B Testing
:::

::: {.big-subtitle}
Make Decisions with Data, Not Opinions
:::

::: {.footer-text}
3-min presentation · Marketing Analytics
:::

:::

## Slide 2 {.clean}

::: {.deck-box}

::: {.slide-title}
What Is A/B Testing?
:::

::: {.slide-subtitle}
Split your audience randomly into two groups. Show each group a different version. Measure which performs better.
:::

::: {.flow-grid}

::: {.flow-card}
Audience

**Users**
:::

::: {.flow-card}
Group A

**Control**

(original)
:::

::: {.vs}
VS
:::

::: {.flow-card}
Group B

**Variant**

(new version)
:::

::: {.flow-card}
Measure

**& Decide**
:::

:::

::: {.rules-grid}

::: {.rule-card}
**One variable at a time**

Only change ONE thing between A and B, otherwise you cannot isolate the cause.
:::

::: {.rule-card}
**Random assignment**

Users must be randomly assigned, not self-selected, to reduce bias.
:::

::: {.rule-card}
**Statistical significance**

Do not stop early. Run until you have enough sample size and confidence.
:::

:::

:::

## Slide 3 {.clean}

::: {.deck-box}

::: {.slide-title}
A Real Example: Email Subject Lines
:::

::: {.slide-subtitle}
Scenario: An e-commerce brand tests two email subject lines on 10,000 subscribers with a 50/50 split.
:::

::: {.example-grid}

::: {.version-card}

::: {.version-heading}
Version A  (Control)
:::

::: {.subject-line}
"Sale starts now — up to 40% off"
:::

Open rate: **18.2%**

CTR: **3.1%**

:::

::: {.vs}
VS
:::

::: {.version-card .version-b}

::: {.version-heading}
Version B  (Variant)  [✓ Winner]{.winner}
:::

::: {.subject-line}
"Your exclusive deal expires tonight"
:::

Open rate: **24.7%** [(+35.7%)]{.winner}

CTR: **5.4%** [(+74.2%)]{.winner}

:::

:::

::: {.why-box}
**Why did B win?** Personalization creates ownership. Urgency creates fear of missing out. Generic discounts are everywhere, but specificity cuts through noise.
:::

:::

## Slide 4 {.clean}

::: {.deck-box}

::: {.final-grid}

::: {}
::: {.slide-title}
Use A/B Testing For...
:::

::: {.use-box}
Email subject lines & CTAs  

Landing page headlines  

Ad copy & creative  

Pricing page layout  

Checkout flow steps  
:::
:::

::: {}
::: {.slide-title}
3 Things to Remember
:::

::: {.remember-card}

::: {.num}
01
:::

::: {}
**One variable only**

Isolate the change so results are interpretable.
:::

:::

::: {.remember-card}

::: {.num}
02
:::

::: {}
**Run long enough**

Small samples lie. Aim for 95% confidence.
:::

:::

::: {.remember-card}

::: {.num}
03
:::

::: {}
**Document everything**

Losing tests teach you just as much as winners.
:::

:::

:::

:::

::: {.bottom-line}
Do not guess. Test. Then test again.
:::

:::
